title: vendor: update container-libs to latest
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: This update is needed because [Podman PR #28662](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28662) depends on the changes introduced in [container-libs PR #831](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/831).
